19_80_15: And the vineyard which Your right hand has planted, and the branch that You made strong for Yourself.
19_80_16: It is burned with fire, it is cut down; they perish at the rebuke of Your countenance.
19_80_17: Let Your hand be upon the man of Your right hand, upon the son of man whom You made strong for Yourself.
19_80_18: Then we will not turn back from You; revive us, and we will call upon Your name.
19_80_19: Restore us, O LORD God of hosts; cause Your face to shine, and we shall be saved!
19_81_1: To the Chief Musician. On an instrument of Gath. A Psalm of Asaph. Sing aloud to God our strength; make a joyful shout to the God of Jacob.
19_81_2: Raise a song and strike the timbrel, the pleasant harp with the lute.
19_81_3: Blow the trumpet at the time of the New Moon, at the full moon, on our solemn feast day.
19_81_4: For this is a statute for Israel, a law of the God of Jacob.
19_81_5: This He established in Joseph as a testimony, when He went throughout the land of Egypt, where I heard a language I did not understand.
19_81_6: I removed his shoulder from the burden; his hands were freed from the baskets.
19_81_7: You called in trouble, and I delivered you; I answered you in the secret place of thunder; I tested you at the waters of Meribah. Selah
19_81_8: Hear, O My people, and I will admonish you! O Israel, if you will listen to Me!
19_81_9: There shall be no foreign god among you; nor shall you worship any foreign god.
19_81_10: I am the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt; open your mouth wide, and I will fill it.
19_81_11: But My people would not heed My voice, and Israel would have none of Me.
19_81_12: So I gave them over to their own stubborn heart, to walk in their own counsels.
19_81_13: Oh, that My people would listen to Me, that Israel would walk in My ways!
19_81_14: I would soon subdue their enemies, and turn My hand against their adversaries.
19_81_15: The haters of the LORD would pretend submission to Him, but their fate would endure forever.
19_81_16: He would have fed them also with the finest of wheat; and with honey from the rock I would have satisfied you.
19_82_1: God stands in the congregation of the mighty; He judges among the gods.
19_82_2: How long will you judge unjustly, and show partiality to the wicked? Selah
19_82_3: Defend the poor and fatherless; do justice to the afflicted and needy.
19_82_4: Deliver the poor and needy; free them from the hand of the wicked.
19_82_5: They do not know, nor do they understand; they walk about in darkness; all the foundations of the earth are unstable.
19_82_6: I said, You are gods, and all of you are children of the Most High.
19_82_7: But you shall die like men, and fall like one of the princes.
19_82_8: Arise, O God, judge the earth; for You shall inherit all nations.
19_83_1: Do not keep silent, O God! Do not hold Your peace, and do not be still, O God!
19_83_2: For behold, Your enemies make a tumult; and those who hate You have lifted up their head.
19_83_3: They have taken crafty counsel against Your people, and consulted together against Your sheltered ones.
19_83_4: They have said, Come, and let us cut them off from being a nation, that the name of Israel may be remembered no more.
19_83_5: For they have consulted together with one consent; they form a confederacy against You.
19_83_6: The tents of Edom and the Ishmaelites; Moab and the Hagrites.
19_83_7: Gebal, Ammon, and Amalek; Philistia with the inhabitants of Tyre.
19_83_8: Assyria also has joined with them; they have helped the children of Lot. Selah
19_83_9: Deal with them as with Midian, as with Sisera, as with Jabin at the Brook Kishon.
19_83_10: Who perished at En Dor, who became as refuse on the earth.
19_83_11: Make their nobles like Oreb and like Zeeb, yes, all their princes like Zebah and Zalmunna.
19_83_12: Who said, Let us take for ourselves the pastures of God for a possession.
19_83_13: O my God, make them like the whirling dust, like the chaff before the wind.
19_83_14: As the fire burns the woods, and as the flame sets the mountains on fire.
19_83_15: So pursue them with Your tempest, and frighten them with Your storm.
19_83_16: Fill their faces with shame, that they may seek Your name, O LORD.
19_83_17: Let them be confounded and dismayed forever; yes, let them be put to shame and perish.
19_83_18: That they may know that You, whose name alone is the LORD, are the Most High over all the earth.
19_84_1: How lovely is Your dwelling place, O LORD of hosts!
19_84_2: My soul longs, yes, even faints for the courts of the LORD; my heart and my flesh cry out for the living God.
19_84_3: Even the sparrow has found a home, and the swallow a nest for herself, where she may lay her young—near Your altars, O LORD of hosts, my King and my God.
19_84_4: Blessed are those who dwell in Your house; they will still be praising You. Selah
19_84_5: Blessed is the man whose strength is in You, whose heart is set on pilgrimage.
19_84_6: As they pass through the Valley of Baca, they make it a spring; the rain also covers it with pools.
19_84_7: They go from strength to strength; each one appears before God in Zion.
19_84_8: O LORD God of hosts, hear my prayer; give ear, O God of Jacob! Selah
19_84_9: O God, behold our shield, and look upon the face of Your anointed.
19_84_10: For a day in Your courts is better than a thousand elsewhere. I would rather be a doorkeeper in the house of my God than dwell in the tents of wickedness.
19_84_11: For the LORD God is a sun and shield; the LORD will give grace and glory; no good thing will He withhold from those who walk uprightly.
19_84_12: O LORD of hosts, blessed is the man who trusts in You!
19_85_1: LORD, You have been favorable to Your land; You have restored the fortunes of Jacob.
19_85_2: You have forgiven the iniquity of Your people; You have covered all their sin. Selah
19_85_3: You have taken away all Your wrath; You have turned from the fierceness of Your anger.
19_85_4: Restore us, O God of our salvation, and cause Your anger toward us to cease.
19_85_5: Will You be angry with us forever? Will You prolong Your anger to all generations?
19_85_6: Will You not revive us again, that Your people may rejoice in You?
19_85_7: Show us Your mercy, LORD, and grant us Your salvation.
19_85_8: I will hear what God the LORD will speak, for He will speak peace to His people and to His saints; but let them not turn back to folly.
19_85_9: Surely His salvation is near to those who fear Him, that glory may dwell in our land.
19_85_10: Mercy and truth have met together; righteousness and peace have kissed.
19_85_11: Truth shall spring out of the earth, and righteousness shall look down from heaven.
19_85_12: Yes, the LORD will give what is good, and our land will yield its increase.
19_85_13: Righteousness will go before Him, and shall make His footsteps our pathway.
19_86_1: Bow down Your ear, O LORD, hear me; for I am poor and needy.
19_86_2: Preserve my life, for I am holy; You are my God; save Your servant who trusts in You!
19_86_3: Be merciful to me, O Lord, for I cry to You all day long.
19_86_4: Rejoice the soul of Your servant, for to You, O Lord, I lift up my soul.
19_86_5: For You, Lord, are good, and ready to forgive, and abundant in mercy to all those who call upon You.
19_86_6: Give ear, O LORD, to my prayer; and attend to the voice of my supplications.
19_86_7: In the day of my trouble I will call upon You, for You will answer me.
19_86_8: Among the gods there is none like You, O Lord; nor are there any works like Your works.
19_86_9: All nations whom You have made shall come and worship before You, O Lord, and shall glorify Your name.
19_86_10: For You are great, and do wondrous things; You alone are God.
19_86_11: Teach me Your way, O LORD; I will walk in Your truth; unite my heart to fear Your name.
19_86_12: I will praise You, O Lord my God, with all my heart, and I will glorify Your name forevermore.
19_86_13: For great is Your mercy toward me, and You have delivered my soul from the depths of Sheol.
19_86_14: O God, the proud have risen against me, and a mob of violent men have sought my life, and have not set You before them.
19_86_15: But You, O Lord, are a God full of compassion, and gracious, longsuffering and abundant in mercy and truth.
19_86_16: Turn to me and be gracious to me; give Your strength to Your servant, and save the son of Your maidservant.
19_86_17: Show me a sign of Your favor, that those who hate me may see it and be ashamed, because You, LORD, have helped me and comforted me.
19_87_1: A Psalm of the sons of Korah. A Song. His foundation is in the holy mountains.
19_87_2: The LORD loves the gates of Zion more than all the dwellings of Jacob.
19_87_3: Glorious things are spoken of you, O city of God! Selah
19_87_4: I will make mention of Rahab and Babylon to those who know Me; behold, O Philistia and Tyre, with Ethiopia: ‘This one was born there.’
19_87_5: And of Zion it will be said, “This one and that one were born in her; and the Most High Himself shall establish her.”
19_87_6: The LORD will record, when He registers the peoples: “This one was born there.” Selah
19_87_7: Both the singers and the players on instruments say, “All my springs are in you.”
19_88_1: A Song. A Psalm of the sons of Korah. To the Chief Musician. Set to “Mahalath Leannoth.” A Contemplation of Heman the Ezrahite. O LORD, God of my salvation, I have cried out day and night before You.
19_88_2: Let my prayer come before You; incline Your ear to my cry.
19_88_3: For my soul is full of troubles, and my life draws near to the grave.
19_88_4: I am counted with those who go down to the pit; I am like a man who has no strength,
19_88_5: Adrift among the dead, like the slain who lie in the grave, whom You remember no more, and who are cut off from Your hand.
19_88_6: You have laid me in the lowest pit, in darkness, in the depths.
19_88_7: Your wrath lies heavy upon me, and You have afflicted me with all Your waves. Selah
19_88_8: You have put away my acquaintances far from me; You have made me an abomination to them; I am shut up, and I cannot get out;
19_88_9: My eye wastes away because of affliction. LORD, I have called daily upon You; I have stretched out my hands to You.
19_88_10: Will You work wonders for the dead? Shall the dead arise and praise You? Selah
19_88_11: Shall Your lovingkindness be declared in the grave? Or Your faithfulness in the place of destruction?
19_88_12: Shall Your wonders be known in the dark? And Your righteousness in the land of forgetfulness?
19_88_13: But to You I have cried out, O LORD, and in the morning my prayer comes before You.
19_88_14: LORD, why do You cast off my soul? Why do You hide Your face from me?
19_88_15: I have been afflicted and ready to die from my youth; I suffer Your terrors; I am distraught.
19_88_16: Your fierce wrath has gone over me; Your terrors have cut me off.
19_88_17: They came around me all day long like water; they engulfed me altogether.
19_88_18: Loved one and friend You have put far from me, and my acquaintances into darkness.
19_89_1: A Contemplation of Ethan the Ezrahite. I will sing of the mercies of the LORD forever; with my mouth will I make known Your faithfulness to all generations.
19_89_2: For I have said, “Mercy shall be built up forever; Your faithfulness You shall establish in the very heavens.”
19_89_3: “I have made a covenant with My chosen, I have sworn to My servant David:
19_89_4: ‘Your seed I will establish forever, and build up your throne to all generations.’” Selah
19_89_5: And the heavens will praise Your wonders, O LORD; Your faithfulness also in the assembly of the saints.
19_89_6: For who in the heavens can be compared to the LORD? Who among the sons of the mighty can be likened to the LORD?
19_89_7: God is greatly to be feared in the assembly of the saints, and to be held in reverence by all those around Him.
19_89_8: O LORD God of hosts, who is mighty like You, O LORD? Your faithfulness also surrounds You.
19_89_9: You rule the raging of the sea; when its waves rise, You still them.
19_89_10: You have broken Rahab in pieces, as one who is slain; You have scattered Your enemies with Your mighty arm.
19_89_11: The heavens are Yours, the earth also is Yours; the world and all its fullness, You have founded them.
19_89_12: The north and the south, You have created them; Tabor and Hermon rejoice in Your name.
19_89_13: You have a mighty arm; strong is Your hand, and high is Your right hand.
19_89_14: Righteousness and justice are the foundation of Your throne; steadfast love and truth go before Your face.
19_89_15: Blessed are the people who know the joyful sound! They walk, O LORD, in the light of Your presence.
19_89_16: In Your name they rejoice all day long, and in Your righteousness they are exalted.
19_89_17: For You are the glory of their strength, and by Your favor our horn is exalted.
19_89_18: For our shield belongs to the LORD, and our king to the Holy One of Israel.
19_89_19: Then You spoke in a vision to Your holy one, and said: “I have granted help to one who is mighty; I have exalted one chosen from the people.
19_89_20: I have found My servant David; with My holy oil I have anointed him,
19_89_21: With whom My hand shall be established; also My arm shall strengthen him.
19_89_22: The enemy shall not outwit him, nor the son of wickedness afflict him.
19_89_23: I will beat down his foes before his face, and strike those who hate him.
19_89_24: But My faithfulness and My mercy shall be with him, and in My name his horn shall be exalted.
19_89_25: Also I will set his hand over the sea, and his right hand over the rivers.
19_89_26: He shall cry to Me, ‘You are my Father, my God, and the rock of my salvation.’
19_89_27: Also I will make him My firstborn, the highest of the kings of the earth.
19_89_28: My mercy I will keep for him forever, and My covenant shall stand firm with him.
19_89_29: His seed also I will make to endure forever, and his throne as the days of heaven.
19_89_30: If his sons forsake My law and do not walk in My judgments,
19_89_31: If they break My statutes and do not keep My commandments,
19_89_32: Then I will punish their transgression with the rod, and their iniquity with stripes.
19_89_33: Nevertheless My lovingkindness I will not utterly take from him, nor allow My faithfulness to fail.
19_89_34: My covenant I will not break, nor alter the word that has gone out of My lips.
19_89_35: Once I have sworn by My holiness; I will not lie to David:
19_89_36: His seed shall endure forever, and his throne as the sun before Me;
19_89_37: It shall be established forever like the moon, even like the faithful witness in the sky.” Selah
19_89_38: But You have cast off and abhorred, You have been furious with Your anointed.
19_89_39: You have renounced the covenant of Your servant; You have profaned his crown by casting it to the ground.
19_89_40: You have broken down all his hedges; You have brought his strongholds to ruin.
19_89_41: All who pass by the way plunder him; he is a reproach to his neighbors.
19_89_42: You have exalted the right hand of his adversaries; You have made all his enemies rejoice.
19_89_43: You have also turned back the edge of his sword, and have not sustained him in the battle.
19_89_44: You have made his glory cease, and cast his throne down to the ground.
19_89_45: The days of his youth You have shortened; You have covered him with shame. Selah
19_89_46: How long, LORD? Will You hide Yourself forever? Will Your wrath burn like fire?
19_89_47: Remember how short my time is; for what futility have You created all the children of men?
19_89_48: What man can live and not see death? Can he deliver his life from the power of the grave? Selah
19_89_49: Lord, where are Your former lovingkindnesses, which You swore to David in Your truth?
19_89_50: Remember, Lord, the reproach of Your servants—how I bear in my bosom the reproach of all the many peoples,
19_89_51: With which Your enemies have reproached, O LORD, with which they have reproached the footsteps of Your anointed.
19_89_52: Blessed be the LORD forevermore! Amen and Amen.
19_90_1: A Prayer of Moses the man of God. Lord, You have been our dwelling place in all generations.
19_90_2: Before the mountains were born, before You gave birth to the earth and the world, from everlasting to everlasting, You are God.
19_90_3: You turn man back to dust and say, “Return, O children of men.”
19_90_4: For a thousand years in Your sight are like yesterday when it is past, and like a watch in the night.
19_90_5: You sweep them away like a flood; they are like a dream. In the morning they are like grass that springs up.
19_90_6: In the morning it flourishes and grows up; in the evening it is cut down and withers.
19_90_7: For we have been consumed by Your anger, and by Your wrath we are terrified.
19_90_8: You have set our iniquities before You, our secret sins in the light of Your presence.
19_90_9: For all our days have passed away in Your wrath; we finish our years like a sigh.
19_90_10: The days of our lives are seventy years; and if by reason of strength they are eighty years, yet their boast is only labor and sorrow; for it is soon cut off, and we fly away.
19_90_11: Who knows the power of Your anger? For as the fear of You, so is Your wrath.
19_90_12: So teach us to number our days, that we may gain a heart of wisdom.
19_90_13: Return, O LORD! How long? And have compassion on Your servants.
19_90_14: Oh, satisfy us early with Your mercy, that we may rejoice and be glad all our days!
19_90_15: Make us glad according to the days in which You have afflicted us, the years in which we have seen evil.
19_90_16: Let Your work appear to Your servants, and Your glory to their children.
19_90_17: And let the beauty of the LORD our God be upon us, and establish the work of our hands for us; yes, establish the work of our hands.
19_91_1: He who dwells in the secret place of the Most High shall abide under the shadow of the Almighty.
19_91_2: I will say of the LORD, “He is my refuge and my fortress; my God, in Him I will trust.”
19_91_3: Surely He shall deliver you from the snare of the fowler and from the perilous pestilence.
19_91_4: He shall cover you with His feathers, and under His wings you shall take refuge; His faithfulness shall be your shield and buckler.
19_91_5: You shall not be afraid of the terror by night, nor of the arrow that flies by day,
19_91_6: nor of the pestilence that walks in darkness, nor of the destruction that lays waste at noonday.
19_91_7: A thousand may fall at your side, and ten thousand at your right hand; but it shall not come near you.
19_91_8: Only with your eyes shall you look, and see the reward of the wicked.
19_91_9: Because you have made the LORD, who is my refuge, even the Most High, your dwelling place,
19_91_10: No evil shall befall you, nor shall any plague come near your dwelling;
19_91_11: For He shall give His angels charge over you, to keep you in all your ways.
19_91_12: In their hands they shall bear you up, lest you dash your foot against a stone.
19_91_13: You shall tread upon the lion and the cobra, the young lion and the serpent you shall trample underfoot.
19_91_14: “Because he has set his love upon Me, therefore I will deliver him; I will set him on high, because he has known My name.
19_91_15: He shall call upon Me, and I will answer him; I will be with him in trouble; I will deliver him and honor him.
19_91_16: With long life I will satisfy him, and show him My salvation.”
19_92_1: A Psalm. A Song for the Sabbath day. It is good to give thanks to the LORD, and to sing praises to Your name, O Most High;
19_92_2: To declare Your lovingkindness in the morning, and Your faithfulness every night,
19_92_3: On an instrument of ten strings, on the lute, and on the harp, with harmonious sound.
19_92_4: For You, LORD, have made me glad through Your work; I will triumph in the works of Your hands.
19_92_5: O LORD, how great are Your works! Your thoughts are very deep.
19_92_6: A senseless man does not know, nor does a fool understand this.
19_92_7: When the wicked spring up like grass, and when all the workers of iniquity flourish, it is that they may be destroyed forever.
19_92_8: But You, LORD, are on high forevermore.
19_92_9: For behold, Your enemies, O LORD, for indeed, Your enemies shall perish; all evildoers shall be scattered.
19_92_10: But my horn You have exalted like a wild ox; I have been anointed with the finest oil.
19_92_11: My eyes have seen the downfall of my enemies; my ears hear the doom of the wicked who rise up against me.
19_92_12: The righteous shall flourish like a palm tree, and grow strong like a cedar in Lebanon.
19_92_13: Those who are planted in the house of the LORD shall flourish in the courts of our God.
19_92_14: They shall still bear fruit in old age; they shall be fresh and flourishing.
19_92_15: To declare that the LORD is upright; He is my rock, and there is no unrighteousness in Him.
19_93_1: The LORD reigns, He is clothed with majesty; the LORD is robed, girded with strength. Surely the world is established, so that it cannot be moved.
19_93_2: Your throne is established from of old; You are from everlasting.
19_93_3: The floods have lifted up, O LORD, the floods have lifted up their voice; the floods lift up their pounding waves.
19_93_4: The LORD on high is mightier than the noise of many waters, than the mighty waves of the sea.
19_93_5: Your testimonies are very sure; holiness adorns Your house, O LORD, forever.
19_94_1: O LORD God, to whom vengeance belongs—O God of vengeance, shine forth!
19_94_2: Rise up, O Judge of the earth; render punishment to the proud.
19_94_3: LORD, how long will the wicked, how long will the wicked triumph?
19_94_4: They utter speech, and speak insolent things; all the workers of iniquity boast in themselves.
19_94_5: They break in pieces Your people, O LORD, and afflict Your heritage.
19_94_6: They slay the widow and the stranger, and murder the fatherless.
19_94_7: Yet they say, “The LORD does not see, nor does the God of Jacob understand.”
19_94_8: Understand, you senseless among the people; and you fools, when will you be wise?
19_94_9: He who planted the ear, shall He not hear? He who formed the eye, shall He not see?
19_94_10: He who instructs the nations, shall He not correct, He who teaches man knowledge?
19_94_11: The LORD knows the thoughts of man, that they are futile.
19_94_12: Blessed is the man whom You instruct, O LORD, and teach out of Your law,
19_94_13: That You may give him rest from the days of adversity, until the pit is dug for the wicked.
19_94_14: For the LORD will not cast off His people, nor will He forsake His inheritance.
19_94_15: But judgment will return to righteousness, and all the upright in heart will follow it.
19_94_16: Who will rise up for me against the evildoers? Who will stand up for me against the workers of iniquity?
19_94_17: Unless the LORD had been my help, my soul would soon have settled in silence.
19_94_18: If I say, “My foot slips,” Your mercy, O LORD, will hold me up.
19_94_19: In the multitude of my anxieties within me, Your comforts delight my soul.
19_94_20: Shall the throne of iniquity, which devises evil by law, have fellowship with You?
19_94_21: They gather together against the life of the righteous, and condemn innocent blood.
19_94_22: But the LORD has been my defense, and my God the rock of my refuge.
19_94_23: He has brought on them their own iniquity, and shall cut them off in their own wickedness; the LORD our God shall cut them off.
19_95_1: Oh come, let us sing to the LORD! Let us shout joyfully to the Rock of our salvation.
19_95_2: Let us come before His presence with thanksgiving; let us shout joyfully to Him with psalms.
19_95_3: For the LORD is the great God, and the great King above all gods.
19_95_4: In His hand are the deep places of the earth; the heights of the hills are His also.
19_95_5: The sea is His, for He made it; and His hands formed the dry land.
19_95_6: Come, let us worship and bow down; let us kneel before the LORD our Maker.
19_95_7: For He is our God, and we are the people of His pasture, the sheep under His care. Today, if you hear His voice:
19_95_8: Do not harden your hearts, as at Meribah, as on the day at Massah in the wilderness,
19_95_9: When your fathers tested Me; they tried Me, though they saw My work.
19_95_10: For forty years I was grieved with that generation, and said, ‘It is a people who go astray in their hearts, and they do not know My ways.’
19_95_11: So I swore in My wrath, ‘They shall not enter My rest.’
19_96_1: Sing to the LORD a new song! Sing to the LORD, all the earth.
19_96_2: Sing to the LORD, bless His name; proclaim the good news of His salvation from day to day.
19_96_3: Declare His glory among the nations, His wondrous works among all peoples.
19_96_4: For the LORD is great and greatly to be praised; He is to be feared above all gods.
19_96_5: For all the gods of the peoples are idols, but the LORD made the heavens.
19_96_6: Splendor and majesty are before Him; strength and beauty are in His sanctuary.
19_96_7: Ascribe to the LORD, O families of the peoples, ascribe to the LORD glory and strength.
19_96_8: Ascribe to the LORD the glory due His name; bring an offering, and come into His courts.
19_96_9: Worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness! Tremble before Him, all the earth.
19_96_10: Say among the nations, “The LORD reigns; the world also is firmly established, it shall not be moved; He shall judge the peoples righteously.”
19_96_11: Let the heavens rejoice, and let the earth be glad; let the sea roar, and all its fullness;
19_96_12: Let the field be joyful, and all that is in it. Then all the trees of the woods will rejoice before the LORD.
19_96_13: For He is coming, for He is coming to judge the earth. He shall judge the world with righteousness, and the peoples with His truth.
19_97_1: The LORD reigns; let the earth rejoice; let the multitude of isles be glad!
19_97_2: Clouds and darkness surround Him; righteousness and justice are the foundation of His throne.
19_97_3: A fire goes before Him, and burns up His enemies round about.
19_97_4: His lightnings light the world; the earth sees and trembles.
19_97_5: The mountains melt like wax at the presence of the LORD, at the presence of the Lord of the whole earth.
19_97_6: The heavens declare His righteousness, and all the peoples see His glory.
19_97_7: Let all be put to shame who serve carved images, who boast of idols. Worship Him, all you gods.
19_97_8: Zion hears and is glad, and the daughters of Judah rejoice because of Your judgments, O LORD.
19_97_9: For You, LORD, are most high above all the earth; You are exalted far above all gods.
19_97_10: You who love the LORD, hate evil! He preserves the souls of His saints; He delivers them out of the hand of the wicked.
19_97_11: Light is sown for the righteous, and gladness for the upright in heart.
19_97_12: Rejoice in the LORD, you righteous, and give thanks at the remembrance of His holy name.
19_98_1: Sing to the LORD a new song! For He has done marvelous things; His right hand and His holy arm have gained Him the victory.
19_98_2: The LORD has made known His salvation; His righteousness He has revealed in the sight of the nations.
19_98_3: He has remembered His mercy and His faithfulness to the house of Israel; all the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.
19_98_4: Shout joyfully to the LORD, all the earth; break forth in song, rejoice, and sing praises.
19_98_5: Sing to the LORD with the harp, with the harp and the sound of a psalm,
19_98_6: With trumpets and the sound of a horn; shout joyfully before the LORD, the King.
19_98_7: Let the sea roar, and all its fullness, the world and those who dwell in it;
19_98_8: Let the rivers clap their hands; let the hills be joyful together before the LORD,
19_98_9: For He is coming to judge the earth. With righteousness He shall judge the world, and the peoples with equity.
19_99_1: The LORD reigns; let the peoples tremble! He sits enthroned between the cherubim; let the earth quake!
19_99_2: The LORD is great in Zion, and He is exalted above all the peoples.
19_99_3: Let them praise Your great and awesome name—He is holy.
19_99_4: The mighty King's strength loves justice; You have established equity; You have executed justice and righteousness in Jacob.
19_99_5: Exalt the LORD our God, and worship at His footstool—He is holy.
19_99_6: Moses and Aaron were among His priests, and Samuel was among those who called upon His name; they called upon the LORD, and He answered them.
19_99_7: He spoke to them in the pillar of cloud; they kept His testimonies and the statute He gave them.
19_99_8: You answered them, O LORD our God; You were to them a forgiving God, though You took vengeance on their deeds.
19_99_9: Exalt the LORD our God, and worship at His holy hill; for the LORD our God is holy.
19_100_1: A Psalm of Thanksgiving. Make a joyful shout to the LORD, all you lands!
19_100_2: Serve the LORD with gladness; come before His presence with singing.
19_100_3: Know that the LORD, He is God; it is He who has made us, and not we ourselves; we are His people and the sheep of His pasture.
19_100_4: Enter into His gates with thanksgiving, and into His courts with praise. Be thankful to Him, and bless His name.
19_100_5: For the LORD is good; His mercy is everlasting, and His truth endures to all generations.
19_101_1: A Psalm of David. I will sing of mercy and justice; to You, O LORD, I will sing praises.
19_101_2: I will behave wisely in a perfect way. Oh, when will You come to me? I will walk within my house with a perfect heart.
19_101_3: I will set nothing wicked before my eyes; I hate the work of those who fall away; it shall not cling to me.
19_101_4: A perverse heart shall depart from me; I will not know wickedness.
19_101_5: Whoever secretly slanders his neighbor, him I will destroy; the one who has a haughty look and a proud heart, him I will not endure.
19_101_6: My eyes shall be on the faithful of the land, that they may dwell with me; he who walks in a perfect way, he shall serve me.
19_101_7: He who works deceit shall not dwell within my house; he who tells lies shall not continue in my presence.
19_101_8: Early I will destroy all the wicked of the land, that I may cut off all the evildoers from the city of the LORD.
19_102_1: A Prayer of the afflicted, when he is overwhelmed and pours out his complaint before the LORD. Hear my prayer, O LORD, and let my cry come to You.
19_102_2: Do not hide Your face from me in the day of my trouble; incline Your ear to me; in the day that I call, answer me speedily.
19_102_3: For my days are consumed like smoke, and my bones are burned like a hearth.
19_102_4: My heart is stricken and withered like grass, so that I forget to eat my bread.
19_102_5: Because of the sound of my groaning, my bones cling to my skin.
19_102_6: I am like a pelican of the wilderness; I am like an owl of the desert.
19_102_7: I lie awake, and am like a sparrow alone on the housetop.
19_102_8: My enemies reproach me all day long; those who deride me swear an oath against me.
19_102_9: For I have eaten ashes like bread, and mingled my drink with weeping,
19_102_10: Because of Your indignation and Your wrath; for You have lifted me up and cast me away.
19_102_11: My days are like a shadow that lengthens, and I wither away like grass.
19_102_12: But You, O LORD, shall endure forever, and the remembrance of Your name to all generations.
19_102_13: You will arise and have mercy on Zion; for the time to favor her, yes, the set time, has come.
19_102_14: For Your servants take pleasure in her stones, and show favor to her dust.
19_102_15: So the nations shall fear the name of the LORD, and all the kings of the earth Your glory.
19_102_16: For the LORD shall build up Zion; He shall appear in His glory.
19_102_17: He shall regard the prayer of the destitute, and shall not despise their prayer.
19_102_18: This will be written for the generation to come, that a people yet to be created may praise the LORD.
19_102_19: For He looked down from the height of His sanctuary; from heaven the LORD gazed upon the earth,
19_102_20: To hear the groaning of the prisoner, to release those condemned to die,
19_102_21: To declare the name of the LORD in Zion, and His praise in Jerusalem,
19_102_22: When the peoples are gathered together, and the kingdoms, to worship the LORD.
19_102_23: He weakened my strength in midcourse; He shortened my days.
19_102_24: I said, “O my God, do not take me away in the midst of my days; Your years are throughout all generations.
19_102_25: Of old You laid the foundation of the earth, and the heavens are the work of Your hands.
19_102_26: They will perish, but You will endure; they will all grow old like a garment; like a cloak You will change them, and they will be changed.
19_102_27: But You are the same, and Your years will have no end.
19_102_28: The children of Your servants will continue, and their descendants will be established before You.”
19_103_1: Bless the LORD, O my soul; and all that is within me, bless His holy name!
19_103_2: Bless the LORD, O my soul, and forget not all His benefits:
19_103_3: Who forgives all your iniquities, who heals all your diseases,
19_103_4: Who redeems your life from the pit, who crowns you with lovingkindness and tender mercies,
19_103_5: Who satisfies your mouth with good things, so that your youth is renewed like the eagle’s.
19_103_6: The LORD executes righteousness and justice for all who are oppressed.
19_103_7: He made known His ways to Moses, His acts to the children of Israel.
19_103_8: The LORD is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and abounding in steadfast love.
19_103_9: He will not always strive with us, nor will He keep His anger forever.
19_103_10: He has not dealt with us according to our sins, nor punished us according to our iniquities.
19_103_11: For as the heavens are high above the earth, so great is His mercy toward those who fear Him;
19_103_12: As far as the east is from the west, so far has He removed our transgressions from us.
19_103_13: As a father shows compassion to his children, so the LORD pities those who fear Him.
19_103_14: For He knows our frame; He remembers that we are dust.
19_103_15: As for man, his days are like grass; as a flower of the field, so he flourishes.
19_103_16: For the wind passes over it, and it is gone, and its place remembers it no more.
19_103_17: But the mercy of the LORD is from everlasting to everlasting on those who fear Him, and His righteousness to children’s children,
19_103_18: To such as keep His covenant, and to those who remember His commandments to do them.
19_103_19: The LORD has established His throne in heaven, and His kingdom rules over all.
19_103_20: Bless the LORD, you His angels, who excel in strength, who do His word, heeding the voice of His word.
19_103_21: Bless the LORD, all you His hosts, you ministers of His, who do His pleasure.
19_103_22: Bless the LORD, all His works, in all places of His dominion. Bless the LORD, O my soul!
19_104_1: Bless the LORD, O my soul! O LORD my God, You are very great: You are clothed with honor and majesty,
19_104_2: Who cover Yourself with light as with a garment, Who stretch out the heavens like a curtain.
19_104_3: He lays the beams of His upper chambers in the waters, Who makes the clouds His chariot, Who walks on the wings of the wind,
19_104_4: Who makes His angels spirits, His ministers a flame of fire.
19_104_5: You who laid the foundations of the earth, so that it should not be moved forever,
19_104_6: You covered it with the deep as with a garment; the waters stood above the mountains.
19_104_7: At Your rebuke they fled; at the voice of Your thunder they hastened away.
19_104_8: They went up over the mountains; they went down into the valleys, to the place which You founded for them.
19_104_9: You set a boundary they cannot cross, so they may not return to cover the earth again.
19_104_10: He sends the springs into the valleys; they flow between the hills.
19_104_11: They give drink to every beast of the field; the wild donkeys quench their thirst.
19_104_12: Beside them the birds of the heavens have their home; they sing among the branches.
19_104_13: He waters the mountains from His upper chambers; the earth is satisfied with the fruit of His works.
19_104_14: He causes the grass to grow for the cattle, and vegetation for the service of man, that he may bring forth food from the earth.
19_104_15: And wine that makes glad the heart of man, oil to make his face shine, and bread which strengthens man's heart.
19_104_16: The trees of the LORD are full of sap, the cedars of Lebanon which He planted.
19_104_17: Where the birds make their nests; the stork has her home in the fir trees.
19_104_18: The high hills are for the wild goats; the cliffs are a refuge for the rock badgers.
19_104_19: He appointed the moon for seasons; the sun knows its going down.
19_104_20: You make darkness, and it is night, in which all the beasts of the forest creep about.
19_104_21: The young lions roar after their prey, and seek their food from God.
19_104_22: When the sun rises, they gather together and lie down in their dens.
19_104_23: Man goes out to his work and to his labor until the evening.
19_104_24: O LORD, how manifold are Your works! In wisdom You have made them all. The earth is full of Your possessions.
19_104_25: This great and wide sea, in which are innumerable teeming things, living things both small and great.
19_104_26: There the ships sail about; there is that Leviathan which You have made to play there.
19_104_27: These all wait for You, that You may give them their food in due season.
19_104_28: What You give them they gather in; You open Your hand, they are filled with good.
19_104_29: You hide Your face, they are troubled; You take away their breath, they die and return to their dust.
19_104_30: You send forth Your Spirit, they are created; and You renew the face of the earth.
19_104_31: May the glory of the LORD endure forever; may the LORD rejoice in His works.
19_104_32: He looks on the earth, and it trembles; He touches the hills, and they smoke.
19_104_33: I will sing to the LORD as long as I live; I will sing praise to my God while I have my being.
19_104_34: May my meditation be sweet to Him; I will be glad in the LORD.
19_104_35: May sinners be consumed from the earth, and the wicked be no more. Bless the LORD, O my soul! Praise the LORD!
19_105_1: Oh, give thanks to the LORD! Call upon His name; make known His deeds among the peoples!
19_105_2: Sing to Him, sing psalms to Him; talk of all His wondrous works!
19_105_3: Glory in His holy name; let the hearts of those rejoice who seek the LORD!
19_105_4: Seek the LORD and His strength; seek His face evermore!
19_105_5: Remember His marvelous works which He has done, His wonders, and the judgments of His mouth.
19_105_6: O seed of Abraham His servant, you children of Jacob, His chosen ones!
19_105_7: He is the LORD our God; His judgments are in all the earth.
19_105_8: He remembers His covenant forever, the word which He commanded, for a thousand generations.
19_105_9: The covenant which He made with Abraham, and His oath to Isaac.
19_105_10: And confirmed it to Jacob for a statute, to Israel as an everlasting covenant.
19_105_11: Saying, “To you I will give the land of Canaan as the allotment of your inheritance.”
19_105_12: When they were few in number, indeed very few, and strangers in it.
19_105_13: When they went from one nation to another, from one kingdom to another people.
19_105_14: He permitted no one to oppress them; He rebuked kings for their sakes,
19_105_15: Saying, “Do not touch My anointed ones, And do My prophets no harm.”
19_105_16: He called for a famine in the land; He destroyed all the provision of bread.
19_105_17: He sent a man before them—Joseph—who was sold as a slave.
19_105_18: They hurt his feet with fetters, his neck was put in an iron collar.
19_105_19: Until the time that his word came to pass, the word of the LORD tested him.
19_105_20: The king sent and released him; the ruler of the people set him free.
19_105_21: He made him lord of his house, and ruler of all his possessions,
19_105_22: To bind his princes at his pleasure, and teach his elders wisdom.
19_105_23: Israel also came into Egypt, and Jacob dwelt in the land of Ham.
19_105_24: He increased His people greatly, and made them stronger than their enemies.
19_105_25: He turned their hearts to hate His people, to deal craftily with His servants.
19_105_26: He sent Moses His servant, and Aaron whom He had chosen.
19_105_27: They performed His signs among them, and wonders in the land of Ham.
19_105_28: He sent darkness, and made it dark; and they did not rebel against His word.
19_105_29: He turned their waters into blood, and killed their fish.
19_105_30: Their land abounded with frogs, even in the chambers of their kings.
19_105_31: He spoke, and there came swarms of flies, and lice in all their territory.
19_105_32: He gave them hail for rain, and flaming fire in their land.
19_105_33: He struck their vines also, and their fig trees, and splintered the trees of their territory.
19_105_34: He spoke, and locusts came, young locusts without number,
19_105_35: And ate up all the vegetation in their land, and devoured the fruit of their ground.
19_105_36: He also destroyed all the firstborn in their land, the first of all their strength.
19_105_37: He also brought them out with silver and gold, and there was none feeble among His tribes.
19_105_38: Egypt was glad when they departed, for the fear of them had fallen upon them.
19_105_39: He spread a cloud for a covering, and fire to give light in the night.
19_105_40: The people asked, and He brought quail, and satisfied them with the bread of heaven.
19_105_41: He opened the rock, and water gushed out; it ran in the dry places like a river.
19_105_42: For He remembered His holy promise, and Abraham His servant.
19_105_43: He brought out His people with joy, His chosen ones with gladness.
19_105_44: He gave them the lands of the Gentiles, and they inherited the labor of the nations,
19_105_45: That they might observe His statutes and keep His laws. Praise the LORD!
19_106_1: Praise the LORD! Oh, give thanks to the LORD, for He is good! For His mercy endures forever.
19_106_2: Who can utter the mighty acts of the LORD? Who can declare all His praise?
19_106_3: Blessed are those who keep justice, and he who does righteousness at all times!
19_106_4: Remember me, O LORD, with the favor You have toward Your people. Oh, visit me with Your salvation,
19_106_5: That I may see the benefit of Your chosen ones, that I may rejoice in the gladness of Your nation, that I may glory with Your inheritance.
19_106_6: We have sinned with our fathers, we have committed iniquity, we have done wickedly.
19_106_7: Our fathers in Egypt did not understand Your wonders; they did not remember the multitude of Your mercies, but rebelled by the sea—the Red Sea.
19_106_8: Nevertheless He saved them for His name’s sake, that He might make His mighty power known.
19_106_9: He rebuked the Red Sea also, and it dried up; So He led them through the depths, as through a desert.
19_106_10: He saved them from the hand of him who hated them, and redeemed them from the power of the enemy.
19_106_11: The waters covered their enemies; not one of them was left.
19_106_12: Then they believed His words; they sang His praise.
19_106_13: They soon forgot His works; they did not wait for His counsel,
19_106_14: But lusted exceedingly in the wilderness, and tested God in the desert.
19_106_15: And He gave them their request, but sent a wasting disease among them.
19_106_16: When they envied Moses in the camp, and Aaron the saint of the LORD,
19_106_17: The earth opened up and swallowed Dathan, and covered the faction of Abiram.
19_106_18: A fire was kindled in their company; the flame burned up the wicked.
19_106_19: They made a calf in Horeb, and worshiped the molded image.
19_106_20: Thus they changed their glory into the image of an ox that eats grass.
19_106_21: They forgot God their Savior, who had done great things in Egypt,
19_106_22: Wondrous works in the land of Ham, awesome things by the Red Sea.
19_106_23: Therefore He said that He would destroy them, had not Moses His chosen one stood before Him in the breach, to turn away His wrath, lest He destroy them.
19_106_24: Then they despised the pleasant land; they did not believe His word,
19_106_25: But complained in their tents, and did not heed the voice of the LORD.
19_106_26: Therefore He raised His hand in an oath against them, to overthrow them in the wilderness,
19_106_27: To overthrow their descendants among the nations, and to scatter them in the lands.
19_106_28: They joined themselves also to Baal of Peor, and ate sacrifices made to the dead.
19_106_29: Thus they provoked Him to anger with their deeds, and the plague broke out among them.
19_106_30: Then Phinehas stood up and intervened, and the plague was stopped.
19_106_31: And that was accounted to him for righteousness to all generations forevermore.
19_106_32: They angered Him also at the waters of strife, so that it went ill with Moses on account of them;
19_106_33: Because they rebelled against His Spirit, so that he spoke rashly with his lips.
19_106_34: They did not destroy the peoples, concerning whom the LORD had commanded them,
19_106_35: But they mingled with the Gentiles and learned their works;
19_106_36: They served their idols, which became a snare to them.
19_106_37: They even sacrificed their sons and their daughters to demons,
19_106_38: And shed innocent blood, the blood of their sons and daughters, whom they sacrificed to the idols of Canaan; and the land was polluted with blood.
19_106_39: Thus they were defiled by their own works, and played the harlot by their own deeds.
19_106_40: Therefore the wrath of the LORD was kindled against His people, so that He abhorred His own inheritance.
19_106_41: And He gave them into the hand of the Gentiles, and those who hated them ruled over them.
19_106_42: Their enemies also oppressed them, and they were brought into subjection under their hand.
19_106_43: Many times He delivered them; but they rebelled in their counsel, and were brought low for their iniquity.
19_106_44: Nevertheless He regarded their affliction, when He heard their cry;
19_106_45: And for their sake He remembered His covenant, and relented according to the multitude of His mercies.
19_106_46: He also made them to be pitied by all those who carried them away captive.
19_106_47: Save us, O LORD our God, and gather us from among the Gentiles, to give thanks to Your holy name, to triumph in Your praise.
19_106_48: Blessed be the LORD God of Israel from everlasting to everlasting! And let all the people say, “Amen!” Praise the LORD!
19_107_1: Oh, give thanks to the LORD, for He is good! For His faithful love endures forever.
19_107_2: Let the redeemed of the LORD say so, whom He has redeemed from the hand of the enemy.
19_107_3: And gathered out of the lands, from the east and from the west, from the north and from the south.
19_107_4: They wandered in the wilderness in a desolate way; they found no city to dwell in.
19_107_5: Hungry and thirsty, their soul fainted within them.
19_107_6: Then they cried out to the LORD in their trouble, and He delivered them out of their distresses.
19_107_7: And He led them forth by the right way, that they might go to a city for a dwelling place.
19_107_8: Oh, that men would give thanks to the LORD for His goodness, and for His wonderful works to the children of men!
19_107_9: For He satisfies the longing soul, and fills the hungry soul with goodness.
19_107_10: Those who sat in darkness and in the shadow of death, bound in affliction and irons—
19_107_11: Because they rebelled against the words of God, and despised the counsel of the Most High,
19_107_12: Therefore He brought down their heart with labor; they fell down, and there was none to help.
19_107_13: Then they cried out to the LORD in their trouble, and He saved them out of their distresses.
19_107_14: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death, and broke their chains in pieces.
19_107_15: Oh, that men would give thanks to the LORD for His goodness, and for His wonderful works to the children of men!
19_107_16: For He has broken the gates of bronze, and cut the bars of iron in two.
19_107_17: Fools, because of their transgression, and because of their iniquities, were afflicted.
19_107_18: Their soul abhorred all manner of food, and they drew near to the gates of death.
19_107_19: Then they cried out to the LORD in their trouble, and He saved them out of their distresses.
19_107_20: He sent His word and healed them, and delivered them from their destructions.
19_107_21: Oh, that men would give thanks to the LORD for His goodness, and for His wonderful works to the children of men!
19_107_22: Let them sacrifice the sacrifices of thanksgiving, and declare His works with rejoicing.
19_107_23: Those who go down to the sea in ships, who do business on great waters,
19_107_24: They see the works of the LORD, and His wonders in the deep.
19_107_25: For He commands and raises the stormy wind, which lifts up the waves of the sea.
19_107_26: They mount up to the heavens, they go down again to the depths; their soul melts because of trouble.
19_107_27: They reel to and fro, and stagger like a drunken man, and are at their wits’ end.
19_107_28: Then they cry out to the LORD in their trouble, and He brings them out of their distresses.
19_107_29: He calms the storm, so that its waves are still.
19_107_30: Then they are glad because they are quiet; so He guides them to their desired haven.
19_107_31: Oh, that men would give thanks to the LORD for His goodness, and for His wonderful works to the children of men!
19_107_32: Let them exalt Him also in the assembly of the people, and praise Him in the company of the elders.
19_107_33: He turns rivers into a wilderness, and the watersprings into dry ground;
19_107_34: A fruitful land into barrenness, for the wickedness of those who dwell in it.
19_107_35: He turns a wilderness into pools of water, and dry land into watersprings.
19_107_36: There He makes the hungry dwell, that they may establish a city for a dwelling place,
19_107_37: And sow fields and plant vineyards, that they may yield a fruitful harvest.
19_107_38: He also blesses them, and they multiply greatly; and He does not let their cattle decrease.
19_107_39: When they are diminished and brought low through oppression, affliction, and sorrow,
19_107_40: He pours contempt on princes, and causes them to wander in the wilderness where there is no way;
19_107_41: Yet He sets the poor on high, far from affliction, and makes their families multiply like flocks.
19_107_42: The righteous see it and rejoice, and all iniquity stops its mouth.
19_107_43: Whoever is wise will observe these things, and they will understand the lovingkindness of the LORD.
19_108_1: A Song. A Psalm of David. O God, my heart is steadfast; I will sing and give praise with all my being.
19_108_2: Awake, lute and harp! I will awaken the dawn.
19_108_3: I will praise You, O LORD, among the peoples, and I will sing praises to You among the nations.
19_108_4: For Your mercy is great above the heavens, and Your truth reaches to the clouds.
19_108_5: Be exalted, O God, above the heavens, and Your glory above all the earth.
19_108_6: That Your beloved may be delivered, save with Your right hand, and hear me.
19_108_7: God has spoken in His holiness: “I will rejoice; I will divide Shechem and measure out the Valley of Succoth.
19_108_8: Gilead is Mine; Manasseh is Mine; Ephraim also is the helmet for My head; Judah is My lawgiver.
19_108_9: Moab is My washpot; over Edom I will cast My shoe; over Philistia I will triumph.
19_108_10: Who will bring me into the strong city? Who will lead me to Edom?
19_108_11: Is it not You, O God, who cast us off? And You, O God, who did not go out with our armies?
19_108_12: Give us help from trouble, for the help of man is useless.
19_108_13: Through God we will do valiantly, for it is He who shall tread down our enemies.
19_109_1: To the Chief Musician. A Psalm of David. Do not keep silent, O God of my praise!
19_109_2: For the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of the deceitful have opened against me; they have spoken against me with a lying tongue.
19_109_3: They have also surrounded me with words of hatred, and fought against me without a cause.
19_109_4: In return for my love they are my accusers, but I give myself to prayer.
19_109_5: Thus they have rewarded me evil for good, and hatred for my love.
19_109_6: Set a wicked man over him, and let an accuser stand at his right hand.
19_109_7: When he is judged, let him be found guilty, and let his prayer become sin.
19_109_8: Let his days be few, and let another take his office.
19_109_9: Let his children be fatherless, and his wife a widow.
19_109_10: Let his children continually be vagabonds, and beg; let them seek their bread also from their desolate places.
19_109_11: Let the creditor seize all that he has, and let strangers plunder his labor.
19_109_12: Let there be none to extend mercy to him, nor let there be any to favor his fatherless children.
19_109_13: Let his posterity be cut off, and in the generation following let their name be blotted out.
19_109_14: Let the iniquity of his fathers be remembered before the LORD, and let not the sin of his mother be blotted out.
19_109_15: Let them be continually before the LORD, that He may cut off the memory of them from the earth.
19_109_16: Because he did not remember to show mercy, but persecuted the poor and needy man, that he might even slay the broken in heart.
19_109_17: As he loved cursing, so let it come to him; as he did not delight in blessing, so let it be far from him.
19_109_18: As he clothed himself with cursing as with his garment, so let it enter his body like water, and like oil into his bones.
19_109_19: Let it be to him like the garment which covers him, and for a belt with which he girds himself continually.
19_109_20: Let this be the LORD’s reward to my accusers, and to those who speak evil against my person.
19_109_21: But You, O GOD the Lord, deal with me for Your name’s sake; because Your mercy is good, deliver me.
19_109_22: For I am poor and needy, and my heart is wounded within me.
19_109_23: I am gone like a shadow when it lengthens; I am shaken off like a locust.
19_109_24: My knees are weak through fasting, and my flesh is feeble from lack of fatness.
19_109_25: I have become a reproach to them; when they see me, they shake their heads in scorn.
19_109_26: Help me, O LORD my God! Save me according to Your steadfast love.
19_109_27: That they may know this is Your hand—You, LORD, have done it!
19_109_28: Let them curse, but You bless; when they arise, let them be ashamed, but let Your servant rejoice.
19_109_29: Let my accusers be clothed with shame, and let them cover themselves with their own disgrace as with a mantle.
19_109_30: I will greatly praise the LORD with my mouth; yes, I will praise Him among the multitude.
19_109_31: For He stands at the right hand of the needy, to save him from those who condemn him.
19_110_1: The LORD said to my Lord, “Sit at My right hand, till I make Your enemies Your footstool.”
19_110_2: The LORD shall send the rod of Your strength out of Zion. Rule in the midst of Your enemies!
19_110_3: Your people shall be volunteers in the day of Your power; in the beauties of holiness, from the womb of the morning, You have the dew of Your youth.
19_110_4: The LORD has sworn and will not relent, “You are a priest forever according to the order of Melchizedek.”
19_110_5: The Lord is at Your right hand; He shall execute kings in the day of His wrath.
19_110_6: He shall judge among the nations, filling them with corpses; He shall execute the heads of many countries.
19_110_7: He shall drink of the brook by the wayside; therefore He shall lift up the head.
19_111_1: Praise the LORD! I will praise the LORD with my whole heart, in the assembly of the upright and in the congregation.
19_111_2: The works of the LORD are great, studied by all who have pleasure in them.
19_111_3: His work is honorable and glorious, and His righteousness endures forever.
19_111_4: He has made His wonderful works to be remembered; the LORD is gracious and full of compassion.
19_111_5: He has given food to those who fear Him; He will ever be mindful of His covenant.
19_111_6: He has declared to His people the power of His works, in giving them the heritage of the nations.
19_111_7: The works of His hands are verity and justice; all His precepts are sure.
19_111_8: They stand fast forever and ever, and are done in truth and uprightness.
19_111_9: He has sent redemption to His people; He has commanded His covenant forever: Holy and awesome is His name.
19_111_10: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom; a good understanding have all those who do His commandments. His praise endures forever.
19_112_1: Praise the LORD! Blessed is the man who fears the LORD, who delights greatly in His commandments.
19_112_2: His descendants will be mighty on earth; the generation of the upright will be blessed.
19_112_3: Wealth and riches will be in his house, and his righteousness endures forever.
19_112_4: Unto the upright there arises light in the darkness; he is gracious, and full of compassion, and righteous.
19_112_5: A good man deals graciously and lends; he will guide his affairs with discretion.
19_112_6: Surely he will never be shaken; the righteous will be in everlasting remembrance.
19_112_7: He will not be afraid of evil tidings; his heart is steadfast, trusting in the LORD.
19_112_8: His heart is established; he will not be afraid, until he sees his desire upon his enemies.
19_112_9: He has dispersed abroad, he has given to the poor; his righteousness endures forever; his horn will be exalted with honor.
19_112_10: The wicked will see it and be grieved; he will gnash his teeth and melt away; the desire of the wicked shall perish.
19_113_1: Praise the LORD! Praise, O servants of the LORD, praise the name of the LORD!
19_113_2: Blessed be the name of the LORD from this time forth and forevermore!
19_113_3: From the rising of the sun to its going down the LORD’s name is to be praised.
19_113_4: The LORD is high above all nations, His glory above the heavens.
19_113_5: Who is like the LORD our God, who dwells on high,
19_113_6: Who humbles Himself to behold the things that are in the heavens and in the earth?
19_113_7: He raises the poor from the dust, and lifts the needy from the ash heap.
19_113_8: That He may seat them with princes, with the princes of His people.
19_113_9: He grants the barren woman a home, making her a joyful mother of children. Praise the LORD!
19_114_1: When Israel went out of Egypt, the house of Jacob from a people of strange language,
19_114_2: Judah became His sanctuary, and Israel His dominion.
19_114_3: The sea saw it and fled; the Jordan turned back.
19_114_4: The mountains skipped like rams, the little hills like lambs.
19_114_5: What ails you, O sea, that you fled? O Jordan, that you turned back?
19_114_6: O mountains, that you skipped like rams? O little hills, like lambs?
19_114_7: Tremble, O earth, at the presence of the Lord, at the presence of the God of Jacob,
19_114_8: Who turned the rock into a pool of water, the flint into a fountain of waters.
19_115_1: Not unto us, O LORD, not unto us, but to Your name give glory, because of Your mercy, because of Your truth.
19_115_2: Why should the nations say, “Where is their God?”
19_115_3: But our God is in heaven; He does whatever He pleases.
19_115_4: Their idols are silver and gold, the work of human hands.
19_115_5: They have mouths, but they do not speak; eyes they have, but they do not see;
19_115_6: They have ears, but they do not hear; noses they have, but they do not smell;
19_115_7: They have hands, but they do not handle; feet they have, but they do not walk; nor do they make a sound in their throat.
19_115_8: Those who make them are like them; so is everyone who trusts in them.
19_115_9: O Israel, trust in the LORD; He is their help and their shield.
19_115_10: O house of Aaron, trust in the LORD; He is their help and their shield.
19_115_11: You who fear the LORD, trust in the LORD; He is their help and their shield.
19_115_12: The LORD has been mindful of us; He will bless us; He will bless the house of Israel; He will bless the house of Aaron.
19_115_13: He will bless those who fear the LORD, both small and great.
19_115_14: May the LORD give you increase more and more, you and your children.
19_115_15: May you be blessed by the LORD, who made heaven and earth.
19_115_16: The heaven, even the heavens, are the LORD’s; but the earth He has given to the children of men.
19_115_17: The dead do not praise the LORD, nor any who go down into silence.
19_115_18: But we will bless the LORD from this time forth and forevermore. Praise the LORD!
19_116_1: I love the LORD, because He has heard my voice and my supplications.
19_116_2: Because He has inclined His ear to me, therefore I will call upon Him as long as I live.
19_116_3: The pains of death surrounded me, and the pangs of Sheol laid hold of me; I found trouble and sorrow.
19_116_4: Then I called upon the name of the LORD: “O LORD, I implore You, deliver my soul!”
19_116_5: Gracious is the LORD, and righteous; yes, our God is merciful.
19_116_6: The LORD preserves the simple; I was brought low, and He saved me.
19_116_7: Return to your rest, O my soul, for the LORD has dealt bountifully with you.
19_116_8: For You have delivered my soul from death, my eyes from tears, and my feet from falling.
19_116_9: I will walk before the LORD in the land of the living.
19_116_10: I believed, therefore I spoke, “I am greatly afflicted.”
19_116_11: I said in my haste, “All men are liars.”
19_116_12: What shall I render to the LORD for all His benefits toward me?
19_116_13: I will lift up the cup of salvation and call upon the name of the LORD.
19_116_14: I will pay my vows to the LORD in the presence of all His people.
19_116_15: Precious in the sight of the LORD is the death of His saints.
19_116_16: O LORD, truly I am Your servant; I am Your servant, the son of Your maidservant; You have loosed my bonds.
19_116_17: I will offer to You the sacrifice of thanksgiving, and will call upon the name of the LORD.
19_116_18: I will pay my vows to the LORD in the presence of all His people,
19_116_19: In the courts of the LORD’s house, in the midst of you, O Jerusalem. Praise the LORD!
19_117_1: Praise the LORD, all you nations! Laud Him, all you peoples!
19_117_2: For His merciful kindness is great toward us, and the truth of the LORD endures forever. Praise the LORD!
19_118_1: Oh, give thanks to the LORD, for He is good! For His mercy endures forever.
19_118_2: Let Israel now say, “His mercy endures forever.”
19_118_3: Let the house of Aaron now say, “His mercy endures forever.”
19_118_4: Let those who fear the LORD now say, “His mercy endures forever.”
19_118_5: I called on the LORD in distress; the LORD answered me and set me in a broad place.
19_118_6: The LORD is on my side; I will not fear. What can man do to me?
19_118_7: The LORD is for me among those who help me; therefore I shall see my desire on those who hate me.
19_118_8: It is better to trust in the LORD than to put confidence in man.
19_118_9: It is better to trust in the LORD than to put confidence in princes.
19_118_10: All nations surrounded me, but in the name of the LORD I will destroy them.
19_118_11: They surrounded me, yes, they surrounded me; but in the name of the LORD I will destroy them.
19_118_12: They surrounded me like bees; they were quenched like a fire of thorns; for in the name of the LORD I will destroy them.
19_118_13: You pushed me violently, that I might fall, but the LORD helped me.
19_118_14: The LORD is my strength and song, and He has become my salvation.
19_118_15: The voice of rejoicing and salvation is in the tents of the righteous; the right hand of the LORD does valiantly.
19_118_16: The right hand of the LORD is exalted; the right hand of the LORD does valiantly.
19_118_17: I shall not die, but live, and declare the works of the LORD.
19_118_18: The LORD has chastened me severely, but He has not given me over to death.
19_118_19: Open to me the gates of righteousness; I will go through them, and I will praise the LORD.
19_118_20: This is the gate of the LORD, through which the righteous shall enter.
19_118_21: I will praise You, for You have answered me, and have become my salvation.
19_118_22: The stone which the builders rejected has become the chief cornerstone.
19_118_23: This was the LORD’s doing; it is marvelous in our eyes.
19_118_24: This is the day the LORD has made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.
19_118_25: Save now, I pray, O LORD; O LORD, I pray, send now prosperity.
19_118_26: Blessed is he who comes in the name of the LORD! We have blessed you from the house of the LORD.
19_118_27: God is the LORD, and He has given us light; bind the sacrifice with cords to the horns of the altar.
19_118_28: You are my God, and I will praise You; You are my God, I will exalt You.
19_118_29: Oh, give thanks to the LORD, for He is good! For His mercy endures forever.
19_119_1: Blessed are the undefiled in the way, who walk in the law of the LORD!
19_119_2: Blessed are those who keep His testimonies, who seek Him with the whole heart.
19_119_3: They also do no iniquity; they walk in His ways.
19_119_4: You have commanded us to keep Your precepts diligently.
19_119_5: Oh, that my ways were directed to keep Your statutes!
19_119_6: Then I would not be ashamed, when I look into all Your commandments.
19_119_7: I will praise You with uprightness of heart, when I learn Your righteous judgments.
19_119_8: I will keep Your statutes; oh, do not forsake me utterly!
19_119_9: How can a young man cleanse his way? By taking heed according to Your word.
19_119_10: With my whole heart I have sought You; oh, let me not wander from Your commandments!
19_119_11: Your word I have hidden in my heart, that I might not sin against You.
19_119_12: Blessed are You, O LORD! Teach me Your statutes.
19_119_13: With my lips I have declared all the judgments of Your mouth.
19_119_14: I have rejoiced in the way of Your testimonies, as much as in all riches.
19_119_15: I will meditate on Your precepts, and contemplate Your ways.
19_119_16: I will delight myself in Your statutes; I will not forget Your word.
19_119_17: Deal bountifully with Your servant, that I may live and keep Your word.
19_119_18: Open my eyes, that I may see wondrous things from Your law.
19_119_19: I am a stranger in the earth; do not hide Your commandments from me.
19_119_20: My soul breaks with longing for Your judgments at all times.
19_119_21: You rebuke the proud—the cursed, who stray from Your commandments.
19_119_22: Remove from me reproach and contempt, for I have kept Your testimonies.
19_119_23: Princes also sit and speak against me, but Your servant meditates on Your statutes.
19_119_24: Your testimonies also are my delight and my counselors.
19_119_25: My soul clings to the dust; revive me according to Your word.
19_119_26: I have declared my ways, and You answered me; teach me Your statutes.
19_119_27: Make me understand the way of Your precepts; so shall I meditate on Your wonderful works.
19_119_28: My soul melts from heaviness; strengthen me according to Your word.
19_119_29: Remove from me the way of lying, and grant me Your law graciously.
19_119_30: I have chosen the way of truth; Your judgments I have laid before me.
19_119_31: I cling to Your testimonies; O LORD, do not put me to shame!
19_119_32: I will run the course of Your commandments, for You shall enlarge my heart.
19_119_33: Teach me, O LORD, the way of Your statutes, and I shall keep it to the end.
19_119_34: Give me understanding, and I shall keep Your law; indeed, I shall observe it with my whole heart.
19_119_35: Make me walk in the path of Your commandments, for I delight in it.
19_119_36: Incline my heart to Your testimonies, and not to covetousness.
19_119_37: Turn away my eyes from looking at worthless things, and revive me in Your way.
19_119_38: Establish Your word to Your servant, who is devoted to fearing You.
19_119_39: Turn away my reproach which I dread, for Your judgments are good.
19_119_40: Behold, I long for Your precepts; revive me in Your righteousness.
19_119_41: Let Your mercies come also to me, O LORD—Your salvation according to Your word.
19_119_42: Then I can answer the one who taunts me, for I trust in Your word.
19_119_43: Do not take the word of truth utterly out of my mouth, for I have hoped in Your ordinances.
19_119_44: So I will keep Your law continually, forever and ever.
19_119_45: I will walk in freedom, for I seek Your precepts.
19_119_46: I will speak of Your testimonies before kings and will not be ashamed.
19_119_47: I will delight myself in Your commandments, which I love.
19_119_48: My hands also I will lift up to Your commandments, which I love, and I will meditate on Your statutes.
19_119_49: Remember the word to Your servant, upon which You have caused me to hope.
19_119_50: This is my comfort in my affliction, for Your word has given me life.
19_119_51: The proud have me in great derision, yet I do not turn aside from Your law.
19_119_52: I remembered Your judgments of old, O LORD, and have comforted myself.
19_119_53: Indignation has taken hold of me because of the wicked, who forsake Your law.
19_119_54: Your statutes have been my songs in the house of my pilgrimage.
19_119_55: I remember Your name in the night, O LORD, and I keep Your law.
19_119_56: This has become mine, because I kept Your precepts.
19_119_57: You are my portion, O LORD; I have said that I would keep Your words.
19_119_58: I entreated Your favor with my whole heart; be merciful to me according to Your word.
19_119_59: I thought about my ways and turned my feet to Your testimonies.
19_119_60: I made haste, and did not delay to keep Your commandments.
19_119_61: The cords of the wicked have bound me, but I have not forgotten Your law.
19_119_62: At midnight I will rise to give thanks to You, because of Your righteous judgments.
19_119_63: I am a companion of all who fear You, and of those who keep Your precepts.
19_119_64: The earth, O LORD, is full of Your mercy; teach me Your statutes.
19_119_65: You have dealt well with Your servant, O LORD, according to Your word.
19_119_66: Teach me good judgment and knowledge, for I believe Your commandments.
19_119_67: Before I was afflicted I went astray, but now I keep Your word.
19_119_68: You are good, and do good; teach me Your statutes.
19_119_69: The proud have forged a lie against me, but I will keep Your precepts with my whole heart.
19_119_70: Their heart is as fat as grease, but I delight in Your law.
19_119_71: It is good for me that I have been afflicted, that I may learn Your statutes.
19_119_72: The law of Your mouth is better to me than thousands of coins of gold and silver.
19_119_73: Your hands have made me and fashioned me; give me understanding, that I may learn Your commandments.
19_119_74: Those who fear You will be glad when they see me, because I have hoped in Your word.
19_119_75: I know, O LORD, that Your judgments are right, and that in faithfulness You have afflicted me.
19_119_76: Let, I pray, Your merciful kindness be for my comfort, according to Your word to Your servant.
19_119_77: Let Your tender mercies come to me, that I may live; for Your law is my delight.
19_119_78: Let the proud be ashamed, for they treated me wrongfully with falsehood; but I will meditate on Your precepts.
19_119_79: Let those who fear You turn to me, those who know Your testimonies.
19_119_80: Let my heart be blameless regarding Your statutes, that I may not be ashamed.
19_119_81: My soul faints for Your salvation, but I hope in Your word.
19_119_82: My eyes fail from searching Your word, longing for Your promise, saying, “When will You comfort me?”
19_119_83: For I have become like a wineskin in smoke, yet I do not forget Your statutes.
19_119_84: How many are the days of Your servant? When will You execute judgment on those who persecute me?
19_119_85: The proud have dug pits for me, which is not according to Your law.
19_119_86: All Your commandments are faithful; they persecute me wrongfully; help me!
19_119_87: They almost made an end of me on earth, but I did not forsake Your precepts.
19_119_88: Revive me according to Your lovingkindness, so that I may keep the testimony of Your mouth.
19_119_89: Forever, O LORD, Your word is settled in heaven.
19_119_90: Your faithfulness endures to all generations; You established the earth, and it stands firm.
19_119_91: They continue this day according to Your ordinances, for all are Your servants.
19_119_92: Unless Your law had been my delight, I would then have perished in my affliction.
19_119_93: I will never forget Your precepts, for by them You have given me life.
19_119_94: I am Yours, save me; for I have sought Your precepts.
19_119_95: The wicked wait for me to destroy me, but I will consider Your testimonies.
19_119_96: I have seen the consummation of all perfection, but Your commandment is exceedingly broad.
19_119_97: Oh, how I love Your law! It is my meditation all the day.
19_119_98: You, through Your commandments, make me wiser than my enemies; for they are ever with me.
19_119_99: I have more understanding than all my teachers, for Your testimonies are my meditation.
19_119_100: I understand more than the ancients, because I keep Your precepts.
19_119_101: I have restrained my feet from every evil way, that I may keep Your word.
19_119_102: I have not departed from Your judgments, for You Yourself have taught me.
19_119_103: How sweet are Your words to my taste, sweeter than honey to my mouth!
19_119_104: Through Your precepts I get understanding; therefore I hate every false way.
19_119_105: Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.
19_119_106: I have sworn and confirmed that I will keep Your righteous judgments.
19_119_107: I am afflicted very much; revive me, O LORD, according to Your word.
19_119_108: Accept, I pray, the freewill offerings of my mouth, O LORD, and teach me Your judgments.
19_119_109: My life is continually in my hand, yet I do not forget Your law.
19_119_110: The wicked have laid a snare for me, yet I have not strayed from Your precepts.
19_119_111: Your testimonies I have taken as a heritage forever, for they are the rejoicing of my heart.
19_119_112: I have inclined my heart to perform Your statutes forever, to the very end.
19_119_113: I hate the double-minded, but I love Your law.
19_119_114: You are my hiding place and my shield; I hope in Your word.
19_119_115: Depart from me, you evildoers, for I will keep the commandments of my God!
19_119_116: Uphold me according to Your word, that I may live; and do not let me be ashamed of my hope.
19_119_117: Hold me up, and I shall be safe, and I shall observe Your statutes continually.
19_119_118: You reject all those who stray from Your statutes, for their deceit is falsehood.
19_119_119: You put away all the wicked of the earth like dross; therefore I love Your testimonies.
19_119_120: My flesh trembles for fear of You, and I am afraid of Your judgments.
19_119_121: I have done justice and righteousness; do not leave me to my oppressors.
19_119_122: Be surety for Your servant for good; do not let the arrogant oppress me.
19_119_123: My eyes fail from seeking Your salvation and Your righteous promise.
19_119_124: Deal with Your servant according to Your mercy, and teach me Your statutes.
19_119_125: I am Your servant; give me understanding, that I may know Your testimonies.
19_119_126: It is time for You to act, O LORD, for they have regarded Your law as void.
19_119_127: Therefore I love Your commandments more than gold, yes, than fine gold!
19_119_128: Therefore all Your precepts concerning all things I consider to be right; I hate every false way.
19_119_129: Your testimonies are wonderful; therefore my soul keeps them.
19_119_130: The entrance of Your words gives light; it gives understanding to the simple.
19_119_131: I opened my mouth and panted, for I longed for Your commandments.
19_119_132: Look upon me and be merciful to me, as Your custom is toward those who love Your name.
19_119_133: Direct my steps by Your word, and let no iniquity have dominion over me.
19_119_134: Redeem me from the oppression of man, that I may keep Your precepts.
19_119_135: Make Your face shine upon Your servant, and teach me Your statutes.
19_119_136: Rivers of water run down from my eyes, because men do not keep Your law.
19_119_137: Righteous are You, O LORD, and upright are Your judgments.
19_119_138: Your testimonies, which You have commanded, are righteous and very faithful.
19_119_139: My zeal has consumed me, because my enemies have forgotten Your words.
19_119_140: Your word is very pure; therefore Your servant loves it.
19_119_141: I am small and despised, yet I do not forget Your precepts.
19_119_142: Your righteousness is an everlasting righteousness, and Your law is truth.
19_119_143: Trouble and anguish have overtaken me, yet Your commandments are my delights.
19_119_144: The righteousness of Your testimonies is everlasting; give me understanding, and I shall live.
19_119_145: I cry out with my whole heart; hear me, O LORD! I will keep Your statutes.
19_119_146: I cry out to You; save me, and I will keep Your testimonies.
19_119_147: I rise before the dawning of the morning, and cry for help; I hope in Your word.
19_119_148: My eyes are awake through the night watches, that I may meditate on Your word.
19_119_149: Hear my voice according to Your lovingkindness; O LORD, revive me according to Your justice.
19_119_150: They draw near who follow after wickedness; they are far from Your law.
19_119_151: You are near, O LORD, and all Your commandments are truth.
19_119_152: Concerning Your testimonies, I have known of old that You have founded them forever.
19_119_153: Consider my affliction and deliver me, for I do not forget Your law.
19_119_154: Plead my cause and redeem me; revive me according to Your word.
19_119_155: Salvation is far from the wicked, for they do not seek Your statutes.
19_119_156: Great are Your tender mercies, O LORD; revive me according to Your judgments.
19_119_157: Many are my persecutors and my enemies, yet I do not turn from Your testimonies.
19_119_158: I see the treacherous, and am disgusted, because they do not keep Your word.
19_119_159: Consider how I love Your precepts; revive me, O LORD, according to Your lovingkindness.
19_119_160: The entirety of Your word is truth, and every one of Your righteous judgments endures forever.
19_119_161: Princes persecute me without a cause, but my heart stands in awe of Your word.
19_119_162: I rejoice at Your word as one who finds great treasure.
19_119_163: I hate and abhor falsehood, but I love Your law.
19_119_164: Seven times a day I praise You, because of Your righteous judgments.
19_119_165: Great peace have those who love Your law, and nothing causes them to stumble.
19_119_166: LORD, I hope for Your salvation, and I do Your commandments.
19_119_167: My soul keeps Your testimonies, and I love them exceedingly.
19_119_168: I keep Your precepts and Your testimonies, for all my ways are before You.
